no_permission: You do not have permission to use this.
nothing_aimed: Nothing in your crosshair. Aim directly at the prop.
not_a_prop: That is not a world prop (looks like a ped or vehicle).
removed_saving: Removed prop %s and saving it permanently...
area_wipe_none: No matching props found within %s m.
area_wipe_confirm: Remove **all** "%s" props within %s m of where you're aiming? This is saved permanently.
menu_area_wipe_hint: Area wipe: aim + press %s in removal mode
restored: Prop restored (it will reappear when the area reloads).
help_body:
**%s** — toggle removal mode
**%s** — remove the prop you're aiming at
**%s** — open this menu
**%s** — (in removal mode) area-wipe the aimed model

Chat: **/undoprop**, **/clearprops**, **/prophelp**
